checkpoints.correctness_role: keeps later normalization from changing the user-facing question
checkpoints.effect: preserves the original query for reproducibility
checkpoints.efficiency_role: starts one trace without extra tool calls

checkpoints.correctness_role: prevents simulated or gold-visible scores from being treated as runtime evidence
checkpoints.effect: marks candidate runs as real-agent runtime executions without promotion judgment

checkpoints.correctness_role: keeps backend deterministic logic limited to compile/request gates and execution

checkpoints.efficiency_role: uses one compact planner call before any SQL/API execution
